name: Classic Hummus
headline: Dip-tastic! | 4 servings
description:
If you haven’t had the pleasure, allow us to introduce you to this creamy Middle Eastern dip! It’s traditionally made with chickpeas, tahini, garlic, and lemon juice, and tastes delicious with just about anything. Spread it on sandwiches, serve alongside veggies for a snack, or use it as the base for a sauce.
Nutrition values are representative of a 2 TBSP serving
